name: Lethal Layers
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the first three ingredients with the metal blade until crumbly. Alternatively, use 2 pastry knives or a pastry cutter to achieve the same texture.
2. Press this mixture into a buttered 9-by-13-inch pan. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
3. Allow the crust to cool completely.
4. Spread pecans evenly over the cooled surface.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs with dark brown sugar until thickened.
6. Add vanilla extract and stir in salt and baking powder (measure these into 1/4 cup measure).
7. Stir the remaining flour into the egg mixture.
8. Pour this batter over the pecans and bake at 375°F for an additional 20 minutes, or until the center is set.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into 32 pieces.
